top3.sql:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_without_content_warning
FROM cards c
INNER JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE l.format = 'commander' 
  AND l.status = 'legal';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.uuid
WHERE l.format = 'commander' AND l.status = 'legal';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_without_content_warning
FROM cards c
INNER JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE l.format = 'commander' 
  AND l.status = 'legal';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM cards c
INNER JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.uuid
WHERE l.format = 'commander' 
  AND l.status = 'legal';

    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.uuid
WHERE l.format = 'commander' AND l.status = 'legal';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_without_content_warning
FROM cards c
INNER JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE l.format = 'commander' 
  AND l.status = 'legal';
